hero.title: Build Your Future in Canada
hero.subtitle: Canada is a top destination for immigrants, known for its strong economy, excellent quality of life, and welcoming multicultural communities. With a range of immigration pathways, newcomers can access career opportunities, quality healthcare, education, and a clear path to permanent residency and citizenship.

visas.title: Immigration Pathways
visas.subtitle: Choose the immigration pathway that fits your goals.

study.title: Study Permit
study.description: Study at Canadian colleges and universities while gaining valuable international experience.

work.title: Work Permit
work.description: Build your career through employer-sponsored or skilled worker programs.

startup.title: Start Up Visa
startup.description: For entrepreneurs with innovative projects and ideas.

express.title: Express Entry
express.description: Immigration program for skilled and qualified workers.
